user_story: As a placement operations lead, I need the decision context in one place so I can prioritize work without chasing disconnected updates.
acceptance_criteria: Context includes customer signal, metric, owner, dependency, and decision date.

user_story: As a product manager, I need a launch metric contract so I can evaluate success before release work starts.
acceptance_criteria: Primary metric, guardrail metric, data source, event owner, and baseline are documented.

user_story: As an engineering lead, I need clear acceptance criteria so sprint delivery matches the product intent.
acceptance_criteria: Acceptance criteria cover happy path, edge cases, instrumentation, QA evidence, and rollback notes.
